items.title: The Pistons didn't get the best of Caris LeVert as nagging injuries kept him from hitting top gear, but the skill set fits what Trajan Langdon prioritizes for their future.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
The Pistons didn't get the best of Caris LeVert as nagging injuries kept him from hitting top gear, but the skill set fits what Trajan Langdon prioritizes for their future.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: Nagging injuries kept LeVert from hitting top gear
media.description: The Pistons didn’t get the best of LeVert in 2025-26 as nagging injuries dogged him from training camp on periodically throughout the season.

items.title: Pistons' Isaiah Stewart, Caris LeVert part of 2 offseason trade possibilities
items.author: Yahoo Sports
